full_text:
Meng Yu (Jingda) 孟郁 (敬達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Yu (孟郁), styledJingda (敬達), was born in Luoyang county, Henan commandery. A brother to an eunuch and served as an excellency. Meng Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
